title: Fit sleeves and bore and hone engine cylinders
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Fit sleeves and bore and hone engine cylinders demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to bore engine cylinder

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Engine block, boring and sleeving information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and measuring equipment for boring are selected and checked for serviceability1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Engine cylinder is measured and calibration requirements for boring are determined1.6 Engine cylinder block is prepared for boring, and reboring machine is prepared to accept engine cylinder block according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.7 Engine cylinder block is correctly positioned and clamped, and limit stop is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Engine block, boring and sleeving information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and measuring equipment for boring are selected and checked for serviceability1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Engine cylinder is measured and calibration requirements for boring are determined1.6 Engine cylinder block is prepared for boring, and reboring machine is prepared to accept engine cylinder block according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.7 Engine cylinder block is correctly positioned and clamped, and limit stop is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Engine block, boring and sleeving information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and measuring equipment for boring are selected and checked for serviceability1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Engine cylinder is measured and calibration requirements for boring are determined1.6 Engine cylinder block is prepared for boring, and reboring machine is prepared to accept engine cylinder block according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.7 Engine cylinder block is correctly positioned and clamped, and limit stop is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to bore engine cylinder

elements.title: Bore engine cylinder

pcs.text: Cutting tools are mounted and positioned, and worn and damaged cutting tools are identified and replaced or sharpened2.2 Boring operations are carried out at correct speeds and feed rates according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures2.3 Engine cylinder is measured to ensure compliance with specifications2.4 Boring operations are completed to required specifications and honing allowances according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cutting tools are mounted and positioned, and worn and damaged cutting tools are identified and replaced or sharpened2.2 Boring operations are carried out at correct speeds and feed rates according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures2.3 Engine cylinder is measured to ensure compliance with specifications2.4 Boring operations are completed to required specifications and honing allowances according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cutting tools are mounted and positioned, and worn and damaged cutting tools are identified and replaced or sharpened2.2 Boring operations are carried out at correct speeds and feed rates according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures2.3 Engine cylinder is measured to ensure compliance with specifications2.4 Boring operations are completed to required specifications and honing allowances according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Bore engine cylinder

elements.title: Prepare to sleeve engine cylinder

pcs.text: Tools and equipment for sleeving are selected, checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Measuring and calibration requirements for sleeving are determined and required sleeve is selected3.3 Engine cylinder block or barrel is prepared for sleeving according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tools and equipment for sleeving are selected, checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Measuring and calibration requirements for sleeving are determined and required sleeve is selected3.3 Engine cylinder block or barrel is prepared for sleeving according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tools and equipment for sleeving are selected, checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Measuring and calibration requirements for sleeving are determined and required sleeve is selected3.3 Engine cylinder block or barrel is prepared for sleeving according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare to sleeve engine cylinder

elements.title: Sleeve engine cylinder

pcs.text: Sleeving operations are carried out according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures4.2 Sleeves are measured to ensure compliance with specifications, including sleeve protrusion4.3 Sleeves are bored as required to required specifications and honing allowances according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sleeving operations are carried out according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures4.2 Sleeves are measured to ensure compliance with specifications, including sleeve protrusion4.3 Sleeves are bored as required to required specifications and honing allowances according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sleeving operations are carried out according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures4.2 Sleeves are measured to ensure compliance with specifications, including sleeve protrusion4.3 Sleeves are bored as required to required specifications and honing allowances according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Sleeve engine cylinder

elements.title: Prepare to hone engine cylinder

pcs.text: Bored engine block is cleaned of residue and swarf according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.2 Tools and equipment for honing are selected, checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.3 Clearances are measured and honing requirements are determined5.4 Honing machine is prepared to accept engine cylinder block according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.5 Engine cylinder block is positioned and securely clamped, and required hone stroke is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.6 Hone stones are selected and speed is set to achieve required finish and cross hatch
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Bored engine block is cleaned of residue and swarf according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.2 Tools and equipment for honing are selected, checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.3 Clearances are measured and honing requirements are determined5.4 Honing machine is prepared to accept engine cylinder block according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.5 Engine cylinder block is positioned and securely clamped, and required hone stroke is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.6 Hone stones are selected and speed is set to achieve required finish and cross hatch?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Bored engine block is cleaned of residue and swarf according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.2 Tools and equipment for honing are selected, checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.3 Clearances are measured and honing requirements are determined5.4 Honing machine is prepared to accept engine cylinder block according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.5 Engine cylinder block is positioned and securely clamped, and required hone stroke is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures5.6 Hone stones are selected and speed is set to achieve required finish and cross hatch.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare to hone engine cylinder

elements.title: Hone engine cylinder

pcs.text: Engine cylinder is honed at correct speed and rate to required finish according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and following machinery safe operating procedures6.2 Engine cylinder is measured to ensure compliance with specifications6.3 Honing operations are completed to required piston to bore clearance according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and following machinery safe operating procedures6.4 Engine cylinder block is thoroughly cleaned of residual honing oil according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engine cylinder is honed at correct speed and rate to required finish according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and following machinery safe operating procedures6.2 Engine cylinder is measured to ensure compliance with specifications6.3 Honing operations are completed to required piston to bore clearance according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and following machinery safe operating procedures6.4 Engine cylinder block is thoroughly cleaned of residual honing oil according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engine cylinder is honed at correct speed and rate to required finish according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and following machinery safe operating procedures6.2 Engine cylinder is measured to ensure compliance with specifications6.3 Honing operations are completed to required piston to bore clearance according to workplace procedures and safety requirements and following machinery safe operating procedures6.4 Engine cylinder block is thoroughly cleaned of residual honing oil according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Hone engine cylinder

elements.title: Complete sleeving, boring and honing processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements7.2 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine cylinder block is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures7.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected7.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements7.2 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine cylinder block is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures7.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected7.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
